longDescription:
The single skill at the heart of `youcoded-inbox` — checks your configured capture sources (Todoist, Drive, Gmail, Apple Notes/Reminders, iCloud, local staging) for unprocessed items and works through them with you in conversation. Items are normalized into a common shape, classified by intent, then resolved one at a time with your approval (answer the question, file the note, create the task, delete the noise).

Use this skill standalone if you only want the triage logic without the rest of the inbox bundle, or invoke it directly with "check my inbox" / "process my notes" whenever you've been collecting captures throughout the day. The session-start hook in `youcoded-inbox` calls it automatically when items are waiting.
